title: Manufacturing Engineer - Daikin India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Daikin India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Daikin India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Daikin India:
Daikin India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India!
